content.content:
1→#!/bin/bash
     2→# Sandcastle installer
     3→# Usage: installer.sh [gen-env|install|reset|uninstall|help]
     4→set -euo pipefail
     5→
     6→# ═══ Colors & helpers ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     7→
     8→RED='\033[0;31m'
     9→GREEN='\033[0;32m'
    10→YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
    11→BLUE='\033[0;34m'
    12→NC='\033[0m'
    13→
    14→info()  { echo -e "${BLUE}[INFO]${NC} $*"; }
    15→ok()    { echo -e "${GREEN}[OK]${NC} $*"; }
    16→warn()  { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $*"; }
    17→error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $*" >&2; }
    18→die()   { error "$@"; exit 1; }
    19→
    20→WRITTEN_FILES=()
    21→wrote() { WRITTEN_FILES+=("$1"); }
    22→print_written_files() {
    23→  if [ ${#WRITTEN_FILES[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
    24→    echo ""
    25→    info "Files created/updated:"
    26→    for f in "${WRITTEN_FILES[@]}"; do
    27→      echo -e "    ${f}"
    28→    done
    29→  fi
    30→  WRITTEN_FILES=()
    31→}
    32→
    33→require_root() {
    34→  [ "$(id -u)" -eq 0 ] || die "This command must be run as root (use sudo)"
    35→}
    36→
    37→# ═══ Parse command ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    38→
    39→COMMAND="${1:-install}"
    40→shift 2>/dev/null || true
    41→
    42→case "$COMMAND" in
    43→  gen-env|install|update|reset|uninstall) ;;
    44→  help|-h|--help) COMMAND="help" ;;
    45→  *) die "Unknown command: $COMMAND (use 'help' for usage)" ;;
    46→esac
    47→
    48→# ═══ Help ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    49→
    50→if [ "$COMMAND" = "help" ]; then
    51→  cat <<'USAGE'
    52→Usage: installer.sh [COMMAND]
    53→
    54→Sandcastle installer — sets up Docker (via Dockyard), Traefik, and the
    55→Sandcastle platform.
    56→
    57→Commands:
    58→  gen-env      Generate sandcastle.env config file (default: ./sandcastle.env)
    59→  install      Install or upgrade Sandcastle (default)
    60→  update       Pull latest images and restart services
    61→  reset        Tear down existing install, then reinstall
    62→  uninstall    Remove Sandcastle completely
    63→  help         Show this help message
    64→
    65→Environment:
    66→  SANDCASTLE_ENV   Path to config file (default search order:
    67→                   ./sandcastle.env → <script_dir>/sandcastle.env →
    68→                   $SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/sandcastle.env)
    69→
    70→Workflow:
    71→  1. installer.sh gen-env              # generate config
    72→  2. vi sandcastle.env                 # edit to taste
    73→  3. sudo installer.sh install         # install (finds ./sandcastle.env)
    74→USAGE
    75→  exit 0
    76→fi
    77→
    78→# ═══ load_env ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    79→
    80→load_env() {
    81→  local script_dir
    82→  script_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
    83→  local home="${SANDCASTLE_HOME:-/sandcastle}"
    84→
    85→  LOADED_ENV_FILE=""
    86→  if [ -n "${SANDCASTLE_ENV:-}" ]; then
    87→    [ ! -f "$SANDCASTLE_ENV" ] && die "Env file not found: $SANDCASTLE_ENV"
    88→    LOADED_ENV_FILE="$(cd "$(dirname "$SANDCASTLE_ENV")" && pwd)/$(basename "$SANDCASTLE_ENV")"
    89→  elif [ -f "./sandcastle.env" ]; then
    90→    LOADED_ENV_FILE="$(pwd)/sandcastle.env"
    91→  elif [ -f "$script_dir/sandcastle.env" ]; then
    92→    LOADED_ENV_FILE="$script_dir/sandcastle.env"
    93→  elif [ -f "$home/etc/sandcastle.env" ]; then
    94→    LOADED_ENV_FILE="$home/etc/sandcastle.env"
    95→  fi
    96→
    97→  if [ -n "$LOADED_ENV_FILE" ]; then
    98→    set -a
    99→    # shellcheck source=/dev/null
   100→    source "$LOADED_ENV_FILE"
   101→    set +a
   102→    info "Loaded $LOADED_ENV_FILE"
   103→  fi
   104→}
   105→
   106→# ═══ derive_vars ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   107→
   108→derive_vars() {
   109→  SANDCASTLE_HOME="${SANDCASTLE_HOME:-/sandcastle}"
   110→  APP_IMAGE="${APP_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle:latest}"
   111→  SANDBOX_IMAGE="${SANDBOX_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox:latest}"
   112→  SANDCASTLE_USER="${SANDCASTLE_USER:-sandcastle}"
   113→  SANDCASTLE_GROUP="${SANDCASTLE_GROUP:-$SANDCASTLE_USER}"
   114→  SANDCASTLE_UID="${SANDCASTLE_UID:-220568}"
   115→  SANDCASTLE_GID="${SANDCASTLE_GID:-220568}"
   116→  SANDCASTLE_HTTP_PORT="${SANDCASTLE_HTTP_PORT:-80}"
   117→  SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT="${SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT:-443}"
   118→  SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE="${SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE:-selfsigned}"
   119→  SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER:-admin}"
   120→
   121→  DOCKYARD_ROOT="${DOCKYARD_ROOT:-$SANDCASTLE_HOME}"
   122→  DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX="${DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX:-sc_}"
   123→
   124→  # Single RFC 1918 /16 from which all Sandcastle Docker networks are carved.
   125→  # Must be a private range (10.x.x.x, 172.16-31.x.x, or 192.168.x.x).
   126→  SANDCASTLE_PRIVATE_NET="${SANDCASTLE_PRIVATE_NET:-10.89.0.0/16}"
   127→  _priv_base="${SANDCASTLE_PRIVATE_NET%%/*}"        # e.g. "10.89.0.0"
   128→  _priv_prefix="${_priv_base%.*.*}"                  # e.g. "10.89"
   129→  DOCKYARD_BRIDGE_CIDR="${DOCKYARD_BRIDGE_CIDR:-${_priv_prefix}.0.1/24}"
   130→  DOCKYARD_FIXED_CIDR="${DOCKYARD_FIXED_CIDR:-${_priv_prefix}.0.0/24}"
   131→  DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE="${DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE:-${SANDCASTLE_PRIVATE_NET}}"
   132→  DOCKYARD_POOL_SIZE="${DOCKYARD_POOL_SIZE:-24}"
   133→
   134→  DOCKER_SOCK="${DOCKYARD_ROOT}/docker.sock"
   135→  DOCKER="${DOCKYARD_ROOT}/docker-runtime/bin/docker"
   136→
   137→  ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture 2>/dev/null || echo "amd64")
   138→
   139→  # Resolve password from file if needed
   140→  if [ -z "${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD:-}" ] && [ -n "${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD_FILE:-}" ]; then
   141→    [ ! -f "$SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD_FILE" ] && die "Password file not found: $SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD_FILE"
   142→    SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD="$(cat "$SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD_FILE")"
   143→  fi
   144→}
   145→
   146→# ═══ setup_ssh_keys ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   147→# Copy deploying user's SSH keys to sandcastle user
   148→
   149→setup_ssh_keys() {
   150→  local deploying_user="${SUDO_USER:-}"
   151→
   152→  if [ -z "$deploying_user" ]; then
   153→    warn "No SUDO_USER found — skipping SSH key setup"
   154→    return
   155→  fi
   156→
   157→  local source_keys="/home/${deploying_user}/.ssh/authorized_keys"
   158→  local target_dir="${SANDCASTLE_HOME}/.ssh"
   159→  local target_keys="${target_dir}/authorized_keys"
   160→
   161→  if [ ! -f "$source_keys" ]; then
   162→    warn "No SSH keys found for user '${deploying_user}' — skipping SSH key setup"
   163→    return
   164→  fi
   165→
   166→  info "Setting up SSH keys for '${SANDCASTLE_USER}'..."
   167→
   168→  # Create .ssh directory if it doesn't exist
   169→  mkdir -p "$target_dir"
   170→  chmod 700 "$target_dir"
   171→  chown "${SANDCASTLE_USER}:${SANDCASTLE_GROUP}" "$target_dir"
   172→
   173→  # Copy authorized_keys
   174→  cp "$source_keys" "$target_keys"
   175→  chmod 600 "$target_keys"
   176→  chown "${SANDCASTLE_USER}:${SANDCASTLE_GROUP}" "$target_keys"
   177→
   178→  ok "SSH keys configured for '${SANDCASTLE_USER}'"
   179→}
   180→
   181→# ═══ setup_passwordless_sudo ══════════════════════════════════════════════
   182→# Add sandcastle user to sudoers with NOPASSWD:ALL
   183→
   184→setup_passwordless_sudo() {
   185→  local sudoers_file="/etc/sudoers.d/sandcastle"
   186→
   187→  info "Configuring passwordless sudo for '${SANDCASTLE_USER}'..."
   188→
   189→  echo "${SANDCASTLE_USER} ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL" > "$sudoers_file"
   190→  chmod 440 "$sudoers_file"
   191→
   192→  # Validate sudoers syntax
   193→  if ! visudo -cf "$sudoers_file" &>/dev/null; then
   194→    rm -f "$sudoers_file"
   195→    warn "Failed to validate sudoers file — skipping passwordless sudo setup"
   196→    return
   197→  fi
   198→
   199→  wrote "$sudoers_file"
   200→  ok "Passwordless sudo configured for '${SANDCASTLE_USER}'"
   201→}
   202→
   203→# ═══ setup_bashrc_path ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   204→# Add docker-runtime/bin to PATH in .profile and .bashrc (idempotent)
   205→
   206→setup_bashrc_path() {
   207→  local profile="${SANDCASTLE_HOME}/.profile"
   208→  local bashrc="${SANDCASTLE_HOME}/.bashrc"
   209→  local path_export="export PATH=${SANDCASTLE_HOME}/docker-runtime/bin:\$PATH"
   210→
   211→  info "Configuring PATH in .profile and .bashrc..."
   212→
   213→  # Add to .profile for SSH non-interactive shells
   214→  touch "$profile"
   215→  chown "${SANDCASTLE_USER}:${SANDCASTLE_GROUP}" "$profile"
   216→
   217→  if ! grep -qF "$path_export" "$profile" 2>/dev/null; then
   218→    echo "$path_export" >> "$profile"
   219→    wrote "$profile"
   220→  fi
   221→
   222→  # Add to .bashrc for interactive shells
   223→  touch "$bashrc"
   224→  chown "${SANDCASTLE_USER}:${SANDCASTLE_GROUP}" "$bashrc"
   225→
   226→  if ! grep -qF "$path_export" "$bashrc" 2>/dev/null; then
   227→    echo "$path_export" >> "$bashrc"
   228→    wrote "$bashrc"
   229→  fi
   230→
   231→  ok "PATH configured in .profile and .bashrc"
   232→}
   233→
   234→# ═══ setup_login_banner ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
   235→# Create a login banner showing Sandcastle version and info
   236→
   237→setup_login_banner() {
   238→  local profile_d="/etc/profile.d/sandcastle-banner.sh"
   239→
   240→  info "Setting up login banner..."
   241→
   242→  cat > "$profile_d" <<'BANNER_SCRIPT'
   243→#!/bin/bash
   244→# Sandcastle login banner
   245→
   246→# Only show on interactive shells
   247→[[ $- == *i* ]] || return 0
   248→
   249→# Skip if already shown in this session
   250→[[ -n "${SANDCASTLE_BANNER_SHOWN:-}" ]] && return 0
   251→export SANDCASTLE_BANNER_SHOWN=1
   252→
   253→# Get version from image build metadata
   254→if [ -f /etc/sandcastle-version ]; then
   255→  VERSION=$(cat /etc/sandcastle-version)
   256→else
   257→  VERSION="unknown"
   258→fi
   259→
   260→cat << 'EOF'
   261→
   262→  ███████╗ █████╗ ███╗   ██╗██████╗  ██████╗ █████╗ ███████╗████████╗██╗     ███████╗
   263→  ██╔════╝██╔══██╗████╗  ██║██╔══██╗██╔════╝██╔══██╗██╔════╝╚══██╔══╝██║     ██╔════╝
   264→  ███████╗███████║██╔██╗ ██║██║  ██║██║     ███████║███████╗   ██║   ██║     █████╗
   265→  ╚════██║██╔══██║██║╚██╗██║██║  ██║██║     ██╔══██║╚════██║   ██║   ██║     ██╔══╝
   266→  ███████║██║  ██║██║ ╚████║██████╔╝╚██████╗██║  ██║███████║   ██║   ███████╗███████╗
   267→  ╚══════╝╚═╝  ╚═╝╚═╝  ╚═══╝╚═════╝  ╚═════╝╚═╝  ╚═╝╚══════╝   ╚═╝   ╚══════╝╚══════╝
   268→
   269→EOF
   270→
   271→echo "  Version: ${VERSION}"
   272→echo "  Docs:    https://github.com/thieso2/Sandcastle"
   273→echo ""
   274→BANNER_SCRIPT
   275→
   276→  chmod +x "$profile_d"
   277→  wrote "$profile_d"
   278→  ok "Login banner configured"
   279→}
   280→
   281→# ═══ ensure_dirs ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   282→# Create/fix data directories and ownership. Safe to run repeatedly.
   283→
   284→ensure_dirs() {
   285→  mkdir -p "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/etc
   286→  mkdir -p "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/data/{users,sandboxes,wetty,postgres}
   287→  mkdir -p "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/data/traefik/{dynamic,certs}
   288→  chown "${SANDCASTLE_USER}:${SANDCASTLE_GROUP}" "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"
   289→  # Own top-level data dirs (not -R: per-user subdirs are bind-mounted into
   290→  # Sysbox containers which use a different UID range via /etc/subuid).
   291→  chown "${SANDCASTLE_UID}:${SANDCASTLE_GID}" \
   292→    "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/data/users \
   293→    "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/data/sandboxes \
   294→    "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/data/wetty
   295→  chown -R "${SANDCASTLE_UID}:${SANDCASTLE_GID}" \
   296→    "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/data/traefik/dynamic
   297→  # Per-user dirs: own the user-level parent, then chmod 777 the bind-mount
   298→  # targets so Sysbox-mapped root can write to them.
   299→  for d in "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/data/users/*; do
   300→    [ -d "$d" ] && chown "${SANDCASTLE_UID}:${SANDCASTLE_GID}" "$d"
   301→  done
   302→  for d in "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/data/users/*/home \
   303→           "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/data/users/*/data \
   304→           "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/data/sandboxes/*/vol; do
   305→    [ -d "$d" ] && chmod 777 "$d"
   306→  done
   307→  # Fix home dir permissions inside running sandbox containers so sshd
   308→  # StrictModes is satisfied (rejects 777 home dirs).
   309→  for cid in $($DOCKER ps -q 2>/dev/null); do
   310→    user=$($DOCKER inspect --format '{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' "$cid" \
   311→      | grep '^SANDCASTLE_USER=' | cut -d= -f2 || true)
   312→    [ -n "$user" ] && $DOCKER exec "$cid" chmod 755 "/home/$user" 2>/dev/null || true
   313→  done
   314→  usermod -d "$SANDCASTLE_HOME" "$SANDCASTLE_USER" 2>/dev/null || true
   315→  ok "Data directories verified"
   316→}

   318→# ═══ Helpers ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   319→
   320→show_image_info() {
   321→  local repo="$1"
   322→  python3 -c "
   323→import urllib.request, json, sys, re
   324→from datetime import datetime, timezone
   325→repo, arch = '${repo}', '${ARCH}'
   326→try:
   327→    r = urllib.request.urlopen(f'https://ghcr.io/token?scope=repository:thieso2/{repo}:pull')
   328→    token = json.load(r)['token']
   329→    h = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'}
   330→    req = urllib.request.Request(
   331→        f'https://ghcr.io/v2/thieso2/{repo}/manifests/latest',
   332→        headers={**h, 'Accept': 'application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json,application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json'})
   333→    m = json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(req))
   334→    if 'manifests' in m:
   335→        for p in m['manifests']:
   336→            if p.get('platform', {}).get('architecture') == arch:
   337→                req = urllib.request.Request(
   338→                    f'https://ghcr.io/v2/thieso2/{repo}/manifests/{p[\"digest\"]}',
   339→                    headers={**h, 'Accept': 'application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json'})
   340→                m = json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(req))
   341→                break
   342→    cfg = json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(
   343→        urllib.request.Request(f'https://ghcr.io/v2/thieso2/{repo}/blobs/{m[\"config\"][\"digest\"]}', headers=h)))
   344→    ts = re.sub(r'(\.\d{6})\d+', r'\1', cfg['created']).replace('Z', '+00:00')
   345→    dt = datetime.fromisoformat(ts)
   346→    secs = int((datetime.now(timezone.utc) - dt).total_seconds())
   347→    if secs < 0: secs = 0
   348→    if secs >= 86400: ago = f'{secs // 86400}d ago'
   349→    elif secs >= 3600: ago = f'{secs // 3600}h ago'
   350→    else: ago = f'{max(1, secs // 60)}m ago'
   351→    print(f'  ghcr.io/thieso2/{repo}:latest    built {dt.strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC\")} ({ago})')
   352→except Exception:
   353→    print(f'  ghcr.io/thieso2/{repo}:latest    (unable to fetch build info)')
   354→" 2>/dev/null || echo "  ghcr.io/thieso2/${repo}:latest"
   355→}
   356→
   357→find_free_subnet() {
   358→  local used
   359→  used=$(
   360→    { ip route 2>/dev/null; ip addr 2>/dev/null; netstat -rn 2>/dev/null; } \
   361→      | grep -oE '(10|172|192)\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' \
   362→      | sort -un
   363→    $DOCKER network ls -q 2>/dev/null | while read -r nid; do
   364→      $DOCKER network inspect --format '{{range .IPAM.Config}}{{.Subnet}}{{end}}' "$nid" 2>/dev/null
   365→    done | grep -oE '(10|172|192)\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' \
   366→      | sort -un
   367→  )
   368→  for b in $(shuf -i 16-31); do
   369→    for c in $(shuf -i 1-254 | head -5); do
   370→      if ! echo "$used" | grep -q "^172\.${b}\.${c}\."; then
   371→        echo "172.${b}.${c}.0/24"
   372→        return
   373→      fi
   374→    done
   375→  done
   376→  for b in $(shuf -i 1-254 | head -20); do
   377→    for c in $(shuf -i 1-254 | head -5); do
   378→      if ! echo "$used" | grep -q "^10\.${b}\.${c}\."; then
   379→        echo "10.${b}.${c}.0/24"
   380→        return
   381→      fi
   382→    done
   383→  done
   384→  echo "172.30.99.0/24"
   385→}

   398→write_compose() {
   399→  local DATA_MOUNT="$SANDCASTLE_HOME/data"
   400→
   401→  cat > "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/docker-compose.yml" <<COMPOSE
   402→services:
   403→  traefik:
   404→    image: traefik:v3.3
   405→    runtime: runc
   406→    restart: unless-stopped
   407→    ports:
   408→      - "${SANDCASTLE_HTTP_PORT}:80"
   409→      - "${SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT}:443"
   410→    volumes:
   411→      - ${DATA_MOUNT}/traefik/traefik.yml:/etc/traefik/traefik.yml:ro
   412→      - ${DATA_MOUNT}/traefik/dynamic:/data/dynamic:ro
   413→      - ${DATA_MOUNT}/traefik/acme.json:/data/acme.json
   414→      - ${DATA_MOUNT}/traefik/certs:/data/certs:ro
   415→    networks:
   416→      - sandcastle-web
   417→
   418→  postgres:
   419→    image: postgres:18
   420→    runtime: runc
   421→    restart: unless-stopped
   422→    volumes:
   423→      - ${SANDCASTLE_HOME}/data/postgres:/var/lib/postgresql
   424→      - ${SANDCASTLE_HOME}/etc/postgres/init-databases.sh:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init-databases.sh:ro
   425→    environment:
   426→      POSTGRES_USER: sandcastle
   427→      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: \${DB_PASSWORD}
   428→      POSTGRES_DB: sandcastle_production
   429→    healthcheck:
   430→      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U sandcastle -d sandcastle_production"]
   431→      interval: 5s
   432→      timeout: 5s
   433→      retries: 5
   434→    networks:
   435→      - sandcastle-web
   436→
   437→  web:
   438→    image: ${APP_IMAGE}
   439→    runtime: runc
   440→    container_name: sandcastle-web
   441→    group_add:
   442→      - "\${DOCKER_GID:-988}"
   443→    volumes:
   444→      - \${DOCKER_SOCK}:/var/run/docker.sock
   445→      - ${DATA_MOUNT}:${DATA_MOUNT}
   446→    environment:
   447→      RAILS_ENV: production
   448→      SECRET_KEY_BASE: \${SECRET_KEY_BASE}
   449→      SANDCASTLE_HOST: \${SANDCASTLE_HOST}
   450→      SANDCASTLE_DATA_DIR: ${DATA_MOUNT}
   451→      SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE: \${SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE:-letsencrypt}
   452→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER: \${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER:-admin}
   453→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL: \${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL:-}
   454→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD: \${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD:-}
   455→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY: \${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY:-}
   456→      DB_HOST: postgres
   457→      DB_USER: sandcastle
   458→      DB_PASSWORD: \${DB_PASSWORD}
   459→      GITHUB_CLIENT_ID: \${GITHUB_CLIENT_ID:-}
   460→      GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET: \${GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET:-}
   461→      GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: \${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:-}
   462→      GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET: \${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET:-}
   463→    restart: unless-stopped
   464→    depends_on:
   465→      migrate:
   466→        condition: service_completed_successfully
   467→    networks:
   468→      - sandcastle-web
   469→
   470→  worker:
   471→    image: ${APP_IMAGE}
   472→    runtime: runc
   473→    container_name: sandcastle-worker
   474→    command: ["./bin/jobs"]
   475→    group_add:
   476→      - "\${DOCKER_GID:-988}"
   477→    volumes:
   478→      - \${DOCKER_SOCK}:/var/run/docker.sock
   479→      - ${DATA_MOUNT}:${DATA_MOUNT}
   480→    environment:
   481→      RAILS_ENV: production
   482→      SECRET_KEY_BASE: \${SECRET_KEY_BASE}
   483→      SANDCASTLE_DATA_DIR: ${DATA_MOUNT}
   484→      DB_HOST: postgres
   485→      DB_USER: sandcastle
   486→      DB_PASSWORD: \${DB_PASSWORD}
   487→    restart: unless-stopped
   488→    depends_on:
   489→      migrate:
   490→        condition: service_completed_successfully
   491→    networks:
   492→      - sandcastle-web
   493→
   494→  migrate:
   495→    image: ${APP_IMAGE}
   496→    runtime: runc
   497→    command: ["./bin/rails", "db:prepare"]
   498→    environment:
   499→      RAILS_ENV: production
   500→      SECRET_KEY_BASE: \${SECRET_KEY_BASE}
   501→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER: \${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER:-admin}
   502→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL: \${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL:-}
   503→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD: \${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD:-}
   504→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY: \${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY:-}
   505→      DB_HOST: postgres
   506→      DB_USER: sandcastle
   507→      DB_PASSWORD: \${DB_PASSWORD}
   508→    depends_on:
   509→      postgres:
   510→        condition: service_healthy
   511→    networks:
   512→      - sandcastle-web
   513→
   514→networks:
   515→  sandcastle-web:
   516→    external: true
   517→COMPOSE
   518→
   519→  wrote "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/docker-compose.yml"
   520→}

   522→# ═══ cmd_gen_env ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   523→
   524→cmd_gen_env() {
   525→  local out="${SANDCASTLE_ENV:-./sandcastle.env}"
   526→  [ -f "$out" ] && die "File already exists: $out"
   527→
   528→  local home="${SANDCASTLE_HOME:-/sandcastle}"
   529→  local app_image="${APP_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle:latest}"
   530→  local sandbox_image="${SANDBOX_IMAGE:-ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox:latest}"
   531→  local user="${SANDCASTLE_USER:-sandcastle}"
   532→  local group="${SANDCASTLE_GROUP:-$user}"
   533→  local uid="${SANDCASTLE_UID:-220568}"
   534→  local gid="${SANDCASTLE_GID:-220568}"
   535→  local http_port="${SANDCASTLE_HTTP_PORT:-80}"
   536→  local https_port="${SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT:-443}"
   537→  local tls_mode="${SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE:-selfsigned}"
   538→
   539→  # Auto-detect host IP
   540→  local host="${SANDCASTLE_HOST:-}"
   541→  if [ -z "$host" ]; then
   542→    host=$(hostname -I 2>/dev/null | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -E '^[0-9]+\.' | head -1 || true)
   543→    host="${host:-$(curl -4fsSL --max-time 5 https://ifconfig.me 2>/dev/null || true)}"
   544→    host="${host:-0.0.0.0}"
   545→  fi
   546→
   547→  local admin_email="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL:-admin@example.com}"
   548→  local admin_user="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER:-admin}"
   549→
   550→  local dy_root="${DOCKYARD_ROOT:-$home}"
   551→  local dy_prefix="${DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX:-sc_}"
   552→  local priv_net="${SANDCASTLE_PRIVATE_NET:-10.89.0.0/16}"
   553→  local _pb="${priv_net%%/*}"; local _pp="${_pb%.*.*}"
   554→  local dy_bridge="${DOCKYARD_BRIDGE_CIDR:-${_pp}.0.1/24}"
   555→  local dy_fixed="${DOCKYARD_FIXED_CIDR:-${_pp}.0.0/24}"
   556→  local dy_pool="${DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE:-${priv_net}}"
   557→  local dy_pool_size="${DOCKYARD_POOL_SIZE:-24}"
   558→
   559→  cat > "$out" <<EOF
   560→# Sandcastle configuration
   561→# Edit values below, then run: sudo installer.sh install
   562→
   563→# ─── Paths & images ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   564→SANDCASTLE_HOME=${home}
   565→APP_IMAGE=${app_image}
   566→SANDBOX_IMAGE=${sandbox_image}
   567→
   568→# ─── System user (home=SANDCASTLE_HOME, shell=/bin/bash) ────────────────────
   569→SANDCASTLE_USER=${user}
   570→SANDCASTLE_GROUP=${group}
   571→SANDCASTLE_UID=${uid}
   572→SANDCASTLE_GID=${gid}
   573→
   574→# ─── Network & TLS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   575→SANDCASTLE_HOST=${host}
   576→SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE=${tls_mode}
   577→#ACME_EMAIL=admin@example.com
   578→SANDCASTLE_HTTP_PORT=${http_port}
   579→SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT=${https_port}
   580→
   581→# ─── Admin account (required for fresh install) ─────────────────────────────
   582→SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER=${admin_user}
   583→SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL=${admin_email}
   584→#SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD=changeme
   585→#REDACTED
   586→#SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY=ssh-ed25519 AAAA...
   587→
   588→# ─── OAuth (optional — enables "Sign in with …" buttons) ──────────────────
   589→#GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=
   590→#GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=
   591→#GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=
   592→#GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=
   593→
   594→# ─── Dockyard (Docker + Sysbox) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   595→DOCKYARD_ROOT=${dy_root}
   596→DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX=${dy_prefix}
   597→
   598→# Private /16 from which all Sandcastle Docker networks are carved.
   599→# Must be RFC 1918: 10.x.x.x, 172.16-31.x.x, or 192.168.x.x.
   600→# Bridge and pool CIDRs are derived from this (override individually below if needed).
   601→SANDCASTLE_PRIVATE_NET=${priv_net}
   602→#DOCKYARD_BRIDGE_CIDR=${dy_bridge}
   603→#DOCKYARD_FIXED_CIDR=${dy_fixed}
   604→#DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE=${dy_pool}
   605→DOCKYARD_POOL_SIZE=${dy_pool_size}
   606→EOF
   607→
   608→  ok "Generated $out — edit it, then run: sudo installer.sh install"
   609→}
   610→
   611→# ═══ cmd_destroy ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   612→
   613→cmd_destroy() {
   614→  local auto_confirm="${1:-false}"
   615→
   616→  require_root
   617→
   618→  # Load installed env for CREATED_USER/CREATED_GROUP
   619→  if [ -f "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/sandcastle.env" ]; then
   620→    # shellcheck source=/dev/null
   621→    source "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/sandcastle.env"
   622→  fi
   623→
   624→  warn "This will remove Sandcastle from $SANDCASTLE_HOME (containers, config, services)"
   625→  if [ "$auto_confirm" != "true" ]; then
   626→    read -rp "Are you sure? (yes to confirm): " CONFIRM
   627→    [ "$CONFIRM" = "yes" ] || die "Aborted"
   628→  fi
   629→
   630→  info "Tearing down Sandcastle..."
   631→  cd /
   632→
   633→  if [ -x "$DOCKER" ]; then
   634→    for container in $($DOCKER ps -a --filter "name=^sc-ts-" --format '{{.Names}}' 2>/dev/null); do
   635→      info "Removing Tailscale sidecar: $container"
   636→      $DOCKER rm -f "$container" 2>/dev/null || true
   637→    done
   638→    for container in $($DOCKER ps -a --filter "runtime=sysbox-runc" --format '{{.Names}}' 2>/dev/null); do
   639→      info "Removing container: $container"
   640→      $DOCKER rm -f "$container" 2>/dev/null || true
   641→    done
   642→    for net in $($DOCKER network ls --filter "name=^sc-ts-net-" --format '{{.Name}}' 2>/dev/null); do
   643→      info "Removing network: $net"
   644→      $DOCKER network rm "$net" 2>/dev/null || true
   645→    done
   646→    if [ -f "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/docker-compose.yml" ]; then
   647→      # Do NOT pass --volumes: postgres data lives in a bind-mount under
   648→      # $SANDCASTLE_HOME/data/postgres which must survive uninstall.
   649→      $DOCKER compose -f "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/docker-compose.yml" --env-file "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" down --rmi all --remove-orphans 2>/dev/null || true
   650→    fi
   651→    $DOCKER network rm sandcastle-web 2>/dev/null || true
   652→
   653→    # Remove sandbox image explicitly (not removed by compose down)
   654→    if [ -n "${SANDBOX_IMAGE:-}" ]; then
   655→      info "Removing sandbox image: $SANDBOX_IMAGE"
   656→      $DOCKER rmi "$SANDBOX_IMAGE" 2>/dev/null || true
   657→    fi
   658→  fi
   659→
   660→  # Destroy Dockyard
   661→  DOCKYARD_ENV_FILE="$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/dockyard.env"
   662→  if [ -f "$DOCKYARD_ENV_FILE" ] || systemctl cat "${DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX}docker.service" &>/dev/null; then
   663→    info "Destroying Dockyard..."
   664→    if [ -f "$DOCKYARD_ENV_FILE" ] && wget -q "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/thieso2/dockyard/refs/heads/main/dockyard.sh" -O /tmp/dockyard.sh 2>/dev/null; then
   665→      echo "y" | DOCKYARD_ENV="$DOCKYARD_ENV_FILE" bash /tmp/dockyard.sh destroy >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
   666→      rm -f /tmp/dockyard.sh
   667→    else
   668→      systemctl stop "${DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX}docker" 2>/dev/null || true
   669→      systemctl disable "${DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX}docker" 2>/dev/null || true
   670→      rm -f "/etc/systemd/system/${DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX}docker.service"
   671→      systemctl daemon-reload 2>/dev/null || true
   672→      ip link delete "${DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX}docker0" 2>/dev/null || true
   673→    fi
   674→    ok "Dockyard destroyed"
   675→  fi
   676→
   677→  # Remove user and group
   678→  if id "$SANDCASTLE_USER" &>/dev/null; then
   679→    # Do NOT use -r: the user's home ($SANDCASTLE_HOME) contains data that
   680→    # must be preserved across reinstalls. Directories are cleaned up explicitly below.
   681→    userdel "$SANDCASTLE_USER" 2>/dev/null || true
   682→    ok "Removed user '${SANDCASTLE_USER}'"
   683→  fi
   684→  if getent group "$SANDCASTLE_GROUP" &>/dev/null; then
   685→    groupdel "$SANDCASTLE_GROUP" 2>/dev/null || true
   686→    ok "Removed group '${SANDCASTLE_GROUP}'"
   687→  fi
   688→
   689→  # sandcastle-nat.service no longer used (dockyard handles NAT for user-defined networks)
   690→
   691→  # Revert UFW firewall rules
   692→  if command -v ufw &>/dev/null && ufw status 2>/dev/null | grep -q "Status: active"; then
   693→    info "Reverting firewall rules..."
   694→    ufw delete allow "${SANDCASTLE_HTTP_PORT:-80}/tcp" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
   695→    ufw delete allow "${SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT:-443}/tcp" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
   696→    ufw delete allow 2201:2299/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
   697→    ok "Firewall rules reverted"
   698→  fi
   699→
   700→  # Remove sudoers file
   701→  if [ -f /etc/sudoers.d/sandcastle ]; then
   702→    rm -f /etc/sudoers.d/sandcastle
   703→    ok "Removed sudoers file"
   704→  fi
   705→
   706→  # Remove login banner
   707→  if [ -f "/etc/profile.d/sandcastle-banner.sh" ]; then
   708→    rm -f /etc/profile.d/sandcastle-banner.sh
   709→    ok "Removed login banner"
   710→  fi
   711→
   712→  # Remove Sandcastle files — keep user data (data/users, data/sandboxes, data/postgres)
   713→  rm -f "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
   714→  rm -f "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/docker-compose.yml"
   715→  rm -rf "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc"
   716→  rm -rf "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/data/traefik"
   717→  rmdir "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/data" 2>/dev/null || true
   718→  rmdir "$SANDCASTLE_HOME" 2>/dev/null || true
   719→  rm -rf "/run/${DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX}docker"
   720→
   721→  if [ -d "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/data/users" ] || [ -d "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/data/sandboxes" ] || [ -d "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/data/postgres" ]; then
   722→    warn "User data preserved in $SANDCASTLE_HOME/data/ — remove manually if no longer needed"
   723→  fi
   724→  # Legacy: older installs stored postgres in a Docker named volume 'pgdata'
   725→  if $DOCKER volume inspect pgdata &>/dev/null 2>&1; then
   726→    warn "Legacy Docker volume 'pgdata' still exists — run '$DOCKER volume rm pgdata' to delete it"
   727→  fi
   728→
   729→  ok "Sandcastle destroyed"
   730→}
   731→
   732→# ═══ cmd_install ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   733→
   734→cmd_install() {
   735→  require_root
   736→
   737→  if ! grep -qi ubuntu /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null; then
   738→    warn "This script is tested on Ubuntu 24.04. Other distros may work but are unsupported."
   739→  fi
   740→  if [ "$ARCH" != "amd64" ] && [ "$ARCH" != "arm64" ]; then
   741→    die "Sandcastle requires amd64 or arm64 architecture (got: $ARCH)"
   742→  fi
   743→
   744→  echo ""
   745→  echo -e "${BLUE}═══ Sandcastle Installer ═══${NC}"
   746→  echo ""
   747→  info "Available images (${ARCH}):"
   748→  show_image_info "sandcastle"
   749→  show_image_info "sandcastle-sandbox"
   750→  echo ""
   751→
   752→  # ── Install Dockyard ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   753→
   754→  if [ -S "$DOCKER_SOCK" ]; then
   755→    ok "Dockyard already installed"
   756→  else
   757→    info "Installing Dockyard (Docker + Sysbox)..."
   758→    wget -q "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/thieso2/dockyard/refs/heads/main/dockyard.sh" -O /tmp/dockyard.sh
   759→
   760→    mkdir -p "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc"
   761→    cat > "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/dockyard.env" <<DYEOF
   762→DOCKYARD_ROOT=${DOCKYARD_ROOT}
   763→DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX=${DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX}
   764→DOCKYARD_BRIDGE_CIDR=${DOCKYARD_BRIDGE_CIDR}
   765→DOCKYARD_FIXED_CIDR=${DOCKYARD_FIXED_CIDR}
   766→DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE=${DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE}
   767→DOCKYARD_POOL_SIZE=${DOCKYARD_POOL_SIZE}
   768→DYEOF
   769→    wrote "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/dockyard.env"
   770→
   771→    DOCKYARD_ENV="$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/dockyard.env" bash /tmp/dockyard.sh create
   772→    rm -f /tmp/dockyard.sh
   773→
   774→    for i in $(seq 1 30); do
   775→      [ -S "$DOCKER_SOCK" ] && break
   776→      sleep 1
   777→    done
   778→    [ -S "$DOCKER_SOCK" ] || die "Dockyard socket not found at $DOCKER_SOCK after 30s"
   779→    ok "Dockyard installed"
   780→  fi
   781→
   782→  # ── Configure UFW ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   783→
   784→  if command -v ufw &>/dev/null; then
   785→    info "Configuring firewall..."
   786→    ufw --force reset >/dev/null 2>&1
   787→    ufw default deny incoming >/dev/null 2>&1
   788→    ufw default allow outgoing >/dev/null 2>&1
   789→    ufw allow 22/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1
   790→    ufw allow "${SANDCASTLE_HTTP_PORT}/tcp" >/dev/null 2>&1
   791→    ufw allow "${SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT}/tcp" >/dev/null 2>&1
   792→    ufw allow 2201:2299/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1
   793→    ufw --force enable >/dev/null 2>&1
   794→    ok "Firewall configured (22, ${SANDCASTLE_HTTP_PORT}, ${SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT}, 2201-2299)"
   795→  else
   796→    warn "UFW not found — skipping firewall setup"
   797→  fi
   798→
   799→  # ── Create system user/group ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   800→
   801→  CREATED_GROUP=false
   802→  CREATED_USER=false
   803→
   804→  if getent group "$SANDCASTLE_GROUP" &>/dev/null; then
   805→    ok "Group '${SANDCASTLE_GROUP}' already exists"
   806→  else
   807→    groupadd --system --gid "$SANDCASTLE_GID" "$SANDCASTLE_GROUP"
   808→    CREATED_GROUP=true
   809→    ok "Created group '${SANDCASTLE_GROUP}' (GID ${SANDCASTLE_GID})"
   810→  fi
   811→
   812→  if id "$SANDCASTLE_USER" &>/dev/null; then
   813→    ok "User '${SANDCASTLE_USER}' already exists"
   814→  else
   815→    useradd --system --uid "$SANDCASTLE_UID" --gid "$SANDCASTLE_GID" \
   816→      --home-dir "$SANDCASTLE_HOME" --shell /bin/bash "$SANDCASTLE_USER"
   817→    CREATED_USER=true
   818→    ok "Created user '${SANDCASTLE_USER}' (UID ${SANDCASTLE_UID})"
   819→  fi
   820→
   821→  # Add sandcastle user to docker group for socket access
   822→  DOCKER_GROUP=$(stat -c '%G' "$DOCKER_SOCK" 2>/dev/null || echo "docker")
   823→  if getent group "$DOCKER_GROUP" &>/dev/null; then
   824→    usermod -aG "$DOCKER_GROUP" "$SANDCASTLE_USER"
   825→    ok "Added '${SANDCASTLE_USER}' to group '${DOCKER_GROUP}'"
   826→  fi
   827→
   828→  # ── Create directories ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   829→
   830→  ensure_dirs
   831→
   832→  # ── SSH & sudo setup ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   833→
   834→  setup_ssh_keys
   835→  setup_passwordless_sudo
   836→  setup_bashrc_path
   837→  setup_login_banner
   838→
   839→  # ── Detect fresh install vs upgrade ─────────────────────────────────────
   840→
   841→  FRESH_INSTALL=false
   842→  [ ! -f "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" ] && FRESH_INSTALL=true
   843→
   844→  # ── Fresh install: validate & generate .env ─────────────────────────────
   845→
   846→  if [ "$FRESH_INSTALL" = true ]; then
   847→    [ -z "${SANDCASTLE_HOST:-}" ] && die "SANDCASTLE_HOST is required (set in sandcastle.env)"
   848→    [ -z "${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL:-}" ] && die "SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL is required (set in sandcastle.env)"
   849→    [ -z "${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD:-}" ] && die "SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD is required (set in sandcastle.env or use SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD_FILE)"
   850→    [ ${#SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD} -lt 6 ] && die "SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD must be at least 6 characters"
   851→
   852→    # SANDCASTLE_SUBNET no longer needed - networks allocated from dockyard pool
   853→
   854→    SECRET_KEY_BASE=$(openssl rand -hex 64)
   855→    DOCKER_GID=$(stat -c '%g' "$DOCKER_SOCK" 2>/dev/null || echo "988")
   856→
   857→    # Preserve DB password across reinstalls (user data)
   858→    POSTGRES_SECRETS_FILE="$SANDCASTLE_HOME/data/postgres/.secrets"
   859→    if [ -f "$POSTGRES_SECRETS_FILE" ]; then
   860→      # shellcheck source=/dev/null
   861→      source "$POSTGRES_SECRETS_FILE"
   862→      info "Reusing existing database password"
   863→    else
   864→      DB_PASSWORD=$(openssl rand -hex 32)
   865→      mkdir -p "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/data/postgres"
   866→      echo "DB_PASSWORD=$DB_PASSWORD" > "$POSTGRES_SECRETS_FILE"
   867→      chmod 600 "$POSTGRES_SECRETS_FILE"
   868→      wrote "$POSTGRES_SECRETS_FILE"
   869→    fi
   870→
   871→    cat > "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" <<EOF
   872→# Sandcastle runtime — generated $(date -Iseconds)
   873→SANDCASTLE_HOME="${SANDCASTLE_HOME}"
   874→SANDCASTLE_HOST="${SANDCASTLE_HOST}"
   875→SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE="${SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE}"
   876→SANDCASTLE_USER="${SANDCASTLE_USER}"
   877→SANDCASTLE_GROUP="${SANDCASTLE_GROUP}"
   878→SANDCASTLE_UID="${SANDCASTLE_UID}"
   879→SANDCASTLE_GID="${SANDCASTLE_GID}"
   880→SECRET_KEY_BASE="${SECRET_KEY_BASE}"
   881→DB_PASSWORD="${DB_PASSWORD}"
   882→SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER}"
   883→SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL}"
   884→SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD}"
   885→SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY:-}"
   886→DOCKER_GID="${DOCKER_GID}"
   887→DOCKER_SOCK="${DOCKER_SOCK}"
   888→ACME_EMAIL="${ACME_EMAIL:-}"
   889→GITHUB_CLIENT_ID="${GITHUB_CLIENT_ID:-}"
   890→GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET="${GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET:-}"
   891→GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID="${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:-}"
   892→GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET="${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET:-}"
   893→EOF
   894→    chmod 600 "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
   895→    wrote "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
   896→  else
   897→    info "Existing install — loading $SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
   898→  fi
   899→
   900→  # shellcheck source=/dev/null
   901→  source "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
   902→
   903→  # Backfill vars that may be missing in older .env files
   904→  if [ -z "${DOCKER_SOCK:-}" ]; then
   905→    DOCKER_SOCK="${DOCKYARD_ROOT}/docker.sock"
   906→    echo "DOCKER_SOCK=$DOCKER_SOCK" >> "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
   907→  fi
   908→  # Backfill OAuth vars from sandcastle.env into .env
   909→  grep -q '^GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=' "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" 2>/dev/null || \
   910→    echo "GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=${GITHUB_CLIENT_ID:-}" >> "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
   911→  grep -q '^GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=' "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" 2>/dev/null || \
   912→    echo "GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=${GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET:-}" >> "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
   913→  grep -q '^GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=' "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" 2>/dev/null || \
   914→    echo "GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:-}" >> "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
   915→  grep -q '^GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=' "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" 2>/dev/null || \
   916→    echo "GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET:-}" >> "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
   917→
   918→  # ── Write installed sandcastle.env ────────────────────────────────────────
   919→
   920→  cat > "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/sandcastle.env" <<EOF
   921→# Sandcastle installed configuration — generated $(date -Iseconds)
   922→SANDCASTLE_HOME="${SANDCASTLE_HOME}"
   923→APP_IMAGE="${APP_IMAGE}"
   924→SANDBOX_IMAGE="${SANDBOX_IMAGE}"
   925→SANDCASTLE_USER="${SANDCASTLE_USER}"
   926→SANDCASTLE_GROUP="${SANDCASTLE_GROUP}"
   927→SANDCASTLE_UID="${SANDCASTLE_UID}"
   928→SANDCASTLE_GID="${SANDCASTLE_GID}"
   929→SANDCASTLE_HOST="${SANDCASTLE_HOST}"
   930→SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE="${SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE}"
   931→SANDCASTLE_HTTP_PORT="${SANDCASTLE_HTTP_PORT}"
   932→SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT="${SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT}"
   933→SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER}"
   934→SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL:-}"
   935→SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY:-}"
   936→ACME_EMAIL="${ACME_EMAIL:-}"
   937→DOCKYARD_ROOT="${DOCKYARD_ROOT}"
   938→DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX="${DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX}"
   939→SANDCASTLE_PRIVATE_NET="${SANDCASTLE_PRIVATE_NET}"
   940→DOCKYARD_BRIDGE_CIDR="${DOCKYARD_BRIDGE_CIDR}"
   941→DOCKYARD_FIXED_CIDR="${DOCKYARD_FIXED_CIDR}"
   942→DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE="${DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE}"
   943→DOCKYARD_POOL_SIZE="${DOCKYARD_POOL_SIZE}"
   944→DOCKER_SOCK="${DOCKER_SOCK}"
   945→DOCKER_GID="${DOCKER_GID:-988}"
   946→GITHUB_CLIENT_ID="${GITHUB_CLIENT_ID:-}"
   947→GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET="${GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET:-}"
   948→GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID="${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:-}"
   949→GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET="${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET:-}"
   950→CREATED_USER="${CREATED_USER}"
   951→CREATED_GROUP="${CREATED_GROUP}"
   952→EOF
   953→  chmod 600 "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/sandcastle.env"
   954→  wrote "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/sandcastle.env"
   955→
   956→  # ── Traefik config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   957→
   958→  TRAEFIK_DIR="$SANDCASTLE_HOME/data/traefik"
   959→
   960→  if [ "$SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE" = "selfsigned" ]; then
   961→    if [ ! -f "$TRAEFIK_DIR/certs/cert.pem" ]; then
   962→      info "Generating self-signed certificate..."
   963→      openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:4096 -sha256 -days 3650 -nodes \
   964→        -keyout "$TRAEFIK_DIR/certs/key.pem" -out "$TRAEFIK_DIR/certs/cert.pem" \
   965→        -subj "/CN=$SANDCASTLE_HOST" \
   966→        -addext "subjectAltName=IP:$SANDCASTLE_HOST" 2>/dev/null
   967→      ok "Self-signed certificate generated"
   968→    fi
   969→
   970→    cat > "$TRAEFIK_DIR/traefik.yml" <<'TEOF'
   971→entryPoints:
   972→  web:
   973→    address: ":80"
   974→    http:
   975→      redirections:
   976→        entryPoint:
   977→          to: websecure
   978→          scheme: https
   979→  websecure:
   980→    address: ":443"
   981→
   982→providers:
   983→  file:
   984→    directory: /data/dynamic
   985→    watch: true
   986→
   987→tls:
   988→  certificates:
   989→    - certFile: /data/certs/cert.pem
   990→      keyFile: /data/certs/key.pem
   991→
   992→log:
   993→  level: INFO
   994→
   995→api:
   996→  dashboard: false
   997→TEOF
   998→
   999→  else
  1000→    cat > "$TRAEFIK_DIR/traefik.yml" <<TEOF
  1001→entryPoints:
  1002→  web:
  1003→    address: ":80"
  1004→    http:
  1005→      redirections:
  1006→        entryPoint:
  1007→          to: websecure
  1008→          scheme: https
  1009→  websecure:
  1010→    address: ":443"
  1011→
  1012→certificatesResolvers:
  1013→  letsencrypt:
  1014→    acme:
  1015→      email: "${ACME_EMAIL}"
  1016→      storage: /data/acme.json
  1017→      httpChallenge:
  1018→        entryPoint: web
  1019→
  1020→providers:
  1021→  file:
  1022→    directory: /data/dynamic
  1023→    watch: true
  1024→
  1025→log:
  1026→  level: INFO
  1027→
  1028→api:
  1029→  dashboard: false
  1030→TEOF
  1031→  fi
  1032→  wrote "$TRAEFIK_DIR/traefik.yml"
  1033→
  1034→  if [ ! -f "$TRAEFIK_DIR/acme.json" ]; then
  1035→    touch "$TRAEFIK_DIR/acme.json"
  1036→    chmod 600 "$TRAEFIK_DIR/acme.json"
  1037→  fi
  1038→
  1039→  if [ "$SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE" = "selfsigned" ]; then
  1040→    cat > "$TRAEFIK_DIR/dynamic/rails.yml" <<TEOF
  1041→http:
  1042→  routers:
  1043→    rails:
  1044→      rule: "HostRegexp(\`.+\`)"
  1045→      service: rails
  1046→      entryPoints:
  1047→        - websecure
  1048→      tls: {}
  1049→  services:
  1050→    rails:
  1051→      loadBalancer:
  1052→        servers:
  1053→          - url: "http://sandcastle-web:80"
  1054→TEOF
  1055→  else
  1056→    cat > "$TRAEFIK_DIR/dynamic/rails.yml" <<TEOF
  1057→http:
  1058→  routers:
  1059→    rails:
  1060→      rule: "Host(\`${SANDCASTLE_HOST}\`)"
  1061→      service: rails
  1062→      entryPoints:
  1063→        - websecure
  1064→      tls:
  1065→        certResolver: letsencrypt
  1066→  services:
  1067→    rails:
  1068→      loadBalancer:
  1069→        servers:
  1070→          - url: "http://sandcastle-web:80"
  1071→TEOF
  1072→  fi
  1073→  wrote "$TRAEFIK_DIR/dynamic/rails.yml"
  1074→
  1075→  chown -R "${SANDCASTLE_UID}:${SANDCASTLE_GID}" "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"/data/traefik/dynamic
  1076→
  1077→  # ── Docker network ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1078→
  1079→  # ── Create sandcastle-web network (allocated from dockyard pool) ────────────
  1080→  # Let dockyard allocate the subnet from its address pool (DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE)
  1081→  # so dockyard's own iptables rules handle NAT/forwarding automatically.
  1082→  # No separate sandcastle-nat service needed.
  1083→  if $DOCKER network inspect sandcastle-web &>/dev/null; then
  1084→    ok "sandcastle-web network exists"
  1085→  else
  1086→    $DOCKER network create sandcastle-web >/dev/null
  1087→    ok "sandcastle-web network created"
  1088→  fi
  1089→
  1090→  # ── Pull images ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1091→
  1092→  info "Pulling images..."
  1093→  $DOCKER pull "$APP_IMAGE" &
  1094→  $DOCKER pull "$SANDBOX_IMAGE" &
  1095→  $DOCKER pull traefik:v3.3 &
  1096→  wait
  1097→  ok "Images pulled"
  1098→
  1099→  # ── Write PostgreSQL init script ──────────────────────────────────────────
  1100→
  1101→  mkdir -p "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/postgres"
  1102→  cat > "$REDACTED.sh" <<'INITDB'
  1103→#!/bin/bash
  1104→set -e
  1105→
  1106→# Create additional databases needed by Solid Cache, Queue, and Cable.
  1107→# The primary database (sandcastle_production) is created automatically
  1108→# by POSTGRES_DB, but the Solid* gems each need their own database.
  1109→
  1110→for db in sandcastle_production_cache sandcastle_production_queue sandcastle_production_cable; do
  1111→  echo "Creating database: $db"
  1112→  psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 --username "$POSTGRES_USER" --dbname "$POSTGRES_DB" <<-EOSQL
  1113→    SELECT 'CREATE DATABASE $db OWNER $POSTGRES_USER'
  1114→    WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT FROM pg_database WHERE datname = '$db')\gexec
  1115→EOSQL
  1116→done
  1117→INITDB
  1118→  chmod +x "$REDACTED.sh"
  1119→  wrote "$REDACTED.sh"
  1120→
  1121→  write_compose
  1122→
  1123→  write_helper_scripts
  1124→
  1125→  # ── Start services ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1126→
  1127→  info "Starting Sandcastle..."
  1128→  cd "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"
  1129→  $DOCKER compose --env-file .env up -d
  1130→
  1131→  # ── Seed database (fresh install) ─────────────────────────────────────────
  1132→
  1133→  if [ "$FRESH_INSTALL" = true ]; then
  1134→    info "Waiting for app to be ready..."
  1135→    for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  1136→      if curl -sfk https://localhost:${SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT}/up >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  1137→        break
  1138→      fi
  1139→      sleep 2
  1140→    done
  1141→
  1142→    info "Seeding database..."
  1143→    $DOCKER compose --env-file .env exec -T \
  1144→      -e SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER}" \
  1145→      -e SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL}" \
  1146→      -e SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD}" \
  1147→      -e SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY="${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY:-}" \
  1148→      web ./bin/rails db:seed
  1149→  fi
  1150→
  1151→  # ── Done ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1152→
  1153→  # Build base URL with port suffix only when non-standard
  1154→  local port_suffix=""
  1155→  [ "$SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT" != "443" ] && port_suffix=":${SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT}"
  1156→  local base_url="https://${SANDCASTLE_HOST}${port_suffix}"
  1157→
  1158→  echo ""
  1159→  echo -e "${GREEN}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
  1160→  echo -e "${GREEN}  Sandcastle is running!${NC}"
  1161→  echo -e "${GREEN}═══════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
  1162→  echo ""
  1163→
  1164→  if [ "$SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE" = "selfsigned" ]; then
  1165→    echo -e "  Dashboard:  ${BLUE}${base_url}${NC} (self-signed cert)"
  1166→  else
  1167→    echo -e "  Dashboard:  ${BLUE}${base_url}${NC}"
  1168→  fi
  1169→
  1170→  if [ "$FRESH_INSTALL" = true ]; then
  1171→    echo ""
  1172→    echo -e "  Admin login:"
  1173→    echo -e "    Email:     ${YELLOW}${SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL}${NC}"
  1174→    echo ""
  1175→    echo -e "  Tailscale:   ${BLUE}${base_url}/tailscale${NC}"
  1176→  fi
  1177→
  1178→  echo ""
  1179→  echo -e "  Home:       $SANDCASTLE_HOME"
  1180→  echo -e "  Config:     $SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/sandcastle.env"
  1181→  echo -e "  Docker:     $DOCKER"
  1182→  echo -e "  Logs:       ${DOCKYARD_ROOT}/docker-runtime/bin/docker-logs"
  1183→
  1184→  print_written_files
  1185→  echo ""
  1186→}
  1187→
  1188→# ═══ cmd_update ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  1189→
  1190→cmd_update() {
  1191→  require_root
  1192→
  1193→  [ ! -f "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" ] && die "No existing install found at $SANDCASTLE_HOME — run 'install' first"
  1194→
  1195→  # shellcheck source=/dev/null
  1196→  source "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
  1197→
  1198→  # Backfill vars that may be missing in older .env files
  1199→  grep -q '^GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=' "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" 2>/dev/null || \
  1200→    echo "GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=${GITHUB_CLIENT_ID:-}" >> "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
  1201→  grep -q '^GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=' "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" 2>/dev/null || \
  1202→    echo "GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=${GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET:-}" >> "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
  1203→  grep -q '^GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=' "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" 2>/dev/null || \
  1204→    echo "GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:-}" >> "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
  1205→  grep -q '^GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=' "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env" 2>/dev/null || \
  1206→    echo "GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET:-}" >> "$SANDCASTLE_HOME/.env"
  1207→
  1208→  echo ""
  1209→  echo -e "${BLUE}═══ Sandcastle Update ═══${NC}"
  1210→  echo ""
  1211→  info "Available images (${ARCH}):"
  1212→  show_image_info "sandcastle"
  1213→  show_image_info "sandcastle-sandbox"
  1214→  echo ""
  1215→
  1216→  ensure_dirs
  1217→
  1218→  info "Pulling images..."
  1219→  $DOCKER pull "$APP_IMAGE" &
  1220→  $DOCKER pull "$SANDBOX_IMAGE" &
  1221→  wait
  1222→  ok "Images pulled"
  1223→
  1224→  write_compose
  1225→  write_helper_scripts
  1226→
  1227→  info "Restarting services..."
  1228→  cd "$SANDCASTLE_HOME"
  1229→  $DOCKER compose --env-file .env up -d
  1230→  ok "Services restarted"
  1231→
  1232→  echo ""
  1233→  echo -e "${GREEN}  Sandcastle updated!${NC}"
  1234→
  1235→  print_written_files
  1236→  echo ""
  1237→}
  1238→
  1239→# ═══ Dispatch ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  1240→
  1241→case "$COMMAND" in
  1242→  gen-env)    cmd_gen_env ;;
  1243→  install)    load_env; derive_vars; cmd_install ;;
  1244→  update)     load_env; derive_vars; cmd_update ;;
  1245→  reset)      load_env; derive_vars; cmd_destroy true; cmd_install ;;
  1246→  uninstall)  load_env; derive_vars; cmd_destroy ;;
  1247→esac
  1248→

content.content:
1→# Sandcastle configuration reference
     2→# Generate your own config with: installer.sh gen-env
     3→# Then edit and install:          sudo installer.sh install
     4→#
     5→# Config file search order (override with SANDCASTLE_ENV):
     6→#   ./sandcastle.env → <script_dir>/sandcastle.env → $SANDCASTLE_HOME/etc/sandcastle.env
     7→#
     8→# NOTE: If SANDCASTLE_HOME is on a BTRFS filesystem, the installer will automatically
     9→#       create BTRFS subvolumes for data directories (users, sandboxes, postgres, wetty,
    10→#       traefik) and the Docker data directory. This enables efficient snapshots and
    11→#       better copy-on-write performance. No configuration is needed — detection is automatic.
    12→
    13→# ─── Paths & images ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    14→
    15→# Home directory for Sandcastle (config, data, compose file)
    16→SANDCASTLE_HOME="/sandcastle"
    17→
    18→# Container images
    19→APP_IMAGE="ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle:latest"
    20→SANDBOX_IMAGE="ghcr.io/thieso2/sandcastle-sandbox:latest"
    21→
    22→# ─── System user (home=SANDCASTLE_HOME, shell=/bin/bash) ────────────────────
    23→
    24→SANDCASTLE_USER="sandcastle"
    25→SANDCASTLE_GROUP="sandcastle"  # defaults to SANDCASTLE_USER
    26→SANDCASTLE_UID="220568"
    27→SANDCASTLE_GID="220568"
    28→
    29→# ─── Network & TLS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    30→
    31→# Host IP or domain name (auto-detected by gen-env)
    32→# SANDCASTLE_HOST="sandbox.example.com"
    33→
    34→# TLS mode: "letsencrypt" or "selfsigned"
    35→SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE="selfsigned"
    36→
    37→# Email for Let's Encrypt (required when TLS mode is letsencrypt)
    38→# ACME_EMAIL="admin@example.com"
    39→
    40→# Host ports for HTTP/HTTPS
    41→SANDCASTLE_HTTP_PORT="80"
    42→SANDCASTLE_HTTPS_PORT="443"
    43→
    44→# NOTE: sandcastle-web network is allocated from DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE (no custom subnet needed)
    45→
    46→# ─── Admin account (required for fresh install) ─────────────────────────────
    47→
    48→# Username for the admin account
    49→SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER="admin"
    50→
    51→# SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL="admin@example.com"
    52→# SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD="changeme"
    53→# SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD_FILE="/path/to/password-file"  # alternative to inline password
    54→# SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY="ssh-ed25519 AAAA..."
    55→
    56→# ─── PostgreSQL ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    57→
    58→# Database user (password is auto-generated during install)
    59→DB_USER="sandcastle"
    60→DB_NAME="sandcastle_production"
    61→# DB_PASSWORD is auto-generated during install
    62→
    63→# ─── OAuth (optional — enables "Sign in with …" buttons) ──────────────────
    64→# Create a GitHub OAuth App: Settings → Developer settings → OAuth Apps
    65→# Callback URL: https://<SANDCASTLE_HOST>/auth/github/callback
    66→#GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=
    67→#GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=
    68→
    69→# Create a Google OAuth client: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials
    70→# Callback URL: https://<SANDCASTLE_HOST>/auth/google/callback
    71→#GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=
    72→#GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=
    73→
    74→# ─── Dockyard (Docker + Sysbox) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    75→
    76→DOCKYARD_ROOT="/sandcastle"
    77→DOCKYARD_DOCKER_PREFIX="sc_"
    78→
    79→# Private /16 network for all Sandcastle Docker networking.
    80→# Must be an RFC 1918 private range: 10.x.x.x, 172.16-31.x.x, or 192.168.x.x.
    81→# The installer derives bridge and pool CIDRs automatically from this value.
    82→# Override DOCKYARD_BRIDGE_CIDR / DOCKYARD_FIXED_CIDR / DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE individually for fine-grained control.
    83→SANDCASTLE_PRIVATE_NET="10.89.0.0/16"
    84→# DOCKYARD_BRIDGE_CIDR="10.89.0.1/24"   # derived: first /24 of SANDCASTLE_PRIVATE_NET
    85→# DOCKYARD_FIXED_CIDR="10.89.0.0/24"    # derived: same /24 network
    86→# DOCKYARD_POOL_BASE="10.89.0.0/16"     # derived: same as SANDCASTLE_PRIVATE_NET
    87→DOCKYARD_POOL_SIZE="24"
    88→

content.content:
1→# LOCAL.md
     2→
     3→Local development environment guide for Sandcastle. Use this file when debugging locally with Docker Compose.
     4→
     5→## Overview
     6→
     7→Sandcastle has two local deployment modes:
     8→
     9→1. **`mise run deploy:local`** — Production-like environment (builds production image, uses `docker-compose.local.yml`)
    10→2. **`mise run deploy:dev`** — Development environment with live reload (mounts source code, uses `docker-compose.dev.yml`)
    11→
    12→Both modes run the full stack (Traefik, PostgreSQL, Rails web, Solid Queue worker) in Docker containers.
    13→
    14→## Prerequisites
    15→
    16→- Docker with Sysbox runtime installed
    17→- `mise` installed (`brew install mise`)
    18→- `sandcastle-web` network created: `docker network create sandcastle-web`
    19→- Self-signed certificates (auto-generated on first run or created manually)
    20→
    21→## Quick Start
    22→
    23→### Production-like Local Environment
    24→
    25→```bash
    26→# Start (builds image and runs)
    27→mise run deploy:local
    28→
    29→# Access at:
    30→#   - https://sandcastle.local:8443 (via Traefik, recommended)
    31→#   - http://sandcastle.local:8080 (via Traefik)
    32→
    33→# Stop
    34→mise run deploy:local:down
    35→
    36→# Reset (remove all volumes and containers, rebuild)
    37→mise run deploy:local:reset
    38→
    39→# View logs
    40→mise run deploy:local:logs
    41→```
    42→
    43→### Development Environment (Live Reload)
    44→
    45→```bash
    46→# Start (mounts source code)
    47→mise run deploy:dev
    48→
    49→# Access at:
    50→#   - https://localhost:8443
    51→#   - http://localhost:8080
    52→
    53→# Stop
    54→mise run deploy:dev:down
    55→
    56→# Reset
    57→mise run deploy:dev:reset
    58→```
    59→
    60→## Commands
    61→
    62→### Starting the Environment
    63→
    64→```bash
    65→# Production-like (full build)
    66→mise run deploy:local
    67→
    68→# Development (live reload)
    69→mise run deploy:dev
    70→```
    71→
    72→### Stopping
    73→
    74→```bash
    75→# Production-like
    76→mise run deploy:local:down
    77→
    78→# Development
    79→mise run deploy:dev:down
    80→
    81→# Alternative: stop all containers manually
    82→docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down
    83→docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down
    84→```
    85→
    86→### Resetting (Clean Slate)
    87→
    88→The reset commands remove WeTTY containers, Tailscale sidecars, all volumes, and orphaned containers:
    89→
    90→```bash
    91→# Production-like
    92→mise run deploy:local:reset
    93→
    94→# Development
    95→mise run deploy:dev:reset
    96→```
    97→
    98→This is useful when:
    99→- Database is in a bad state
   100→- Volumes are corrupted
   101→- You want a fresh start
   102→
   103→**Warning:** This deletes all data including database, user sandboxes, and Traefik config.
   104→
   105→### Viewing Logs
   106→
   107→```bash
   108→# Tail all logs (production-like)
   109→mise run deploy:local:logs
   110→
   111→# Tail all logs (development)
   112→docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f
   113→
   114→# Specific service
   115→docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml logs -f web
   116→docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f worker
   117→
   118→# Last 100 lines
   119→docker logs sandcastle-web --tail 100
   120→
   121→# Follow logs for a specific container
   122→docker logs -f sandcastle-web
   123→docker logs -f sandcastle-worker
   124→```
   125→
   126→## Inspecting the Environment
   127→
   128→### Container Status
   129→
   130→```bash
   131→# List all Sandcastle containers
   132→docker ps -a | grep sandcastle
   133→
   134→# List all containers (including sandboxes, WeTTY, Tailscale)
   135→docker ps -a
   136→
   137→# Filter by name pattern
   138→docker ps -a --filter "name=sc-wetty-"
   139→docker ps -a --filter "name=sc-ts-"
   140→```
   141→
   142→### Database Access
   143→
   144→```bash
   145→# Enter PostgreSQL container
   146→docker exec -it sandcastle_postgres_1 psql -U sandcastle -d sandcastle_production
   147→
   148→# Or for dev environment
   149→docker exec -it sandcastle_postgres_1 psql -U sandcastle -d sandcastle_development
   150→
   151→# Run a query
   152→docker exec -it sandcastle_postgres_1 psql -U sandcastle -d sandcastle_production -c "SELECT * FROM users;"
   153→
   154→# Check database size
   155→docker exec -it sandcastle_postgres_1 psql -U sandcastle -d sandcastle_production -c "\l+"
   156→```
   157→
   158→### Rails Console
   159→
   160→```bash
   161→# Production-like environment
   162→docker exec -it sandcastle-web ./bin/rails console
   163→
   164→# Development environment (same command)
   165→docker exec -it sandcastle-web ./bin/rails console
   166→```
   167→
   168→### Inspect Volumes
   169→
   170→```bash
   171→# List volumes
   172→docker volume ls | grep sandcastle
   173→
   174→# Inspect a volume
   175→docker volume inspect sandcastle_sandcastle-data
   176→docker volume inspect sandcastle_pgdata
   177→
   178→# Browse volume contents (via temporary container)
   179→docker run --rm -v sandcastle_sandcastle-data:/data -it busybox sh
   180→# Inside container: ls -la /data
   181→```
   182→
   183→### Network Inspection
   184→
   185→```bash
   186→# List networks
   187→docker network ls | grep sandcastle
   188→
   189→# Inspect the bridge network
   190→docker network inspect sandcastle-web
   191→
   192→# Check what containers are on the network
   193→docker network inspect sandcastle-web -f '{{range .Containers}}{{.Name}} {{end}}'
   194→```
   195→
   196→### Traefik Dashboard
   197→
   198→Traefik doesn't expose the dashboard by default. To view routing config:
   199→
   200→```bash
   201→# Inspect Traefik dynamic config
   202→docker exec -it sandcastle_traefik_1 cat /data/dynamic/rails.yml
   203→
   204→# View all dynamic configs
   205→docker exec -it sandcastle_traefik_1 ls -la /data/dynamic/
   206→```
   207→
   208→### Docker Socket Access
   209→
   210→The web and worker containers need Docker socket access to manage sandbox containers:
   211→
   212→```bash
   213→# Check if socket is mounted
   214→docker inspect sandcastle-web | grep -A 5 Mounts | grep docker.sock
   215→
   216→# Test Docker access from inside the container
   217→docker exec sandcastle-web docker ps
   218→```
   219→
   220→## Environment Variables
   221→
   222→### Production-like (`docker-compose.local.yml`)
   223→
   224→| Variable | Default | Description |
   225→|----------|---------|-------------|
   226→| `BUILD_VERSION` | `dev` | Version tag (auto-set from git) |
   227→| `BUILD_GIT_SHA` | `local` | Git commit SHA (auto-set) |
   228→| `BUILD_GIT_DIRTY` | `false` | Whether working tree is dirty |
   229→| `BUILD_DATE` | current | Build timestamp |
   230→| `SECRET_KEY_BASE` | `deadbeef` | Rails secret (change for production) |
   231→| `DB_PASSWORD` | `sandcastle` | PostgreSQL password |
   232→| `DOCKER_GID` | `0` | Docker socket group ID |
   233→
   234→### Development (`docker-compose.dev.yml`)
   235→
   236→Same as production-like, plus:
   237→
   238→| Variable | Default | Description |
   239→|----------|---------|-------------|
   240→| `RAILS_ENV` | `development` | Rails environment |
   241→| `SANDCASTLE_HOST` | `localhost` | Host for URLs |
   242→
   243→## Architecture
   244→
   245→### Services
   246→
   247→- **traefik** — Reverse proxy (ports 8080:80, 8443:443)
   248→- **postgres** — PostgreSQL 18 database
   249→- **web** — Rails app (Puma server on port 80 inside container)
   250→- **worker** — Solid Queue background worker
   251→- **migrate** — One-shot migration runner (runs on startup)
   252→- **init-data** — One-shot data directory initializer
   253→- **init-traefik** — One-shot Traefik config initializer
   254→
   255→### Networks
   256→
   257→- **sandcastle-web** — External bridge network (must be created manually)
   258→- **default** — Default compose network for internal communication
   259→
   260→### Volumes
   261→
   262→| Volume | Purpose |
   263→|--------|---------|
   264→| `pgdata` | PostgreSQL data |
   265→| `sandcastle-data` | User homes, sandbox volumes, Tailscale state |
   266→| `traefik-data` | Traefik config and certificates |
   267→| `bundle-data` | Ruby gems (dev mode only) |
   268→| `node-modules` | Node packages (dev mode only) |
   269→
   270→### Ports
   271→
   272→- **8080** — HTTP (Traefik web entrypoint)
   273→- **8443** — HTTPS (Traefik websecure entrypoint)
   274→- **2201-2299** — SSH ports for sandboxes (mapped to host)
   275→
   276→## Troubleshooting
   277→
   278→### Containers Won't Start
   279→
   280→```bash
   281→# Check container logs
   282→docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml logs
   283→
   284→# Inspect failed container
   285→docker inspect sandcastle-web
   286→
   287→# Check for port conflicts
   288→lsof -i :8080
   289→lsof -i :8443
   290→```
   291→
   292→### Database Connection Errors
   293→
   294→```bash
   295→# Check if postgres is healthy
   296→docker inspect sandcastle_postgres_1 | grep Health -A 10
   297→
   298→# Check database logs
   299→docker logs sandcastle_postgres_1
   300→
   301→# Try connecting manually
   302→docker exec -it sandcastle_postgres_1 psql -U sandcastle -d sandcastle_production
   303→```
   304→
   305→### Docker Socket Permission Denied
   306→
   307→The web/worker containers need access to `/var/run/docker.sock`. On macOS this usually works, on Linux you may need to set `DOCKER_GID`:
   308→
   309→```bash
   310→# Find Docker socket GID
   311→stat -c '%g' /var/run/docker.sock  # Linux
   312→stat -f '%g' /var/run/docker.sock  # macOS
   313→
   314→# Set it in your environment
   315→export DOCKER_GID=988
   316→mise run deploy:local
   317→```
   318→
   319→### Traefik Not Routing
   320→
   321→```bash
   322→# Check if sandcastle-web network exists
   323→docker network ls | grep sandcastle-web
   324→
   325→# Create it if missing
   326→docker network create sandcastle-web
   327→
   328→# Restart Traefik
   329→docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml restart traefik
   330→
   331→# Check Traefik logs
   332→docker logs sandcastle_traefik_1
   333→```
   334→
   335→### Sandbox Containers Won't Start
   336→
   337→Sandboxes require the Sysbox runtime:
   338→
   339→```bash
   340→# Check if Sysbox is installed
   341→docker info | grep -i sysbox
   342→
   343→# List available runtimes
   344→docker info | grep -A 5 Runtimes
   345→
   346→# Check Sysbox status (Linux)
   347→systemctl status sysbox
   348→```
   349→
   350→### Reset Everything
   351→
   352→If things are completely broken:
   353→
   354→```bash
   355→# Stop everything
   356→mise run deploy:local:down
   357→mise run deploy:dev:down
   358→
   359→# Remove all Sandcastle containers
   360→docker ps -a | grep -E "sandcastle|sc-wetty|sc-ts" | awk '{print $1}' | xargs -r docker rm -f
   361→
   362→# Remove all volumes
   363→docker volume ls | grep sandcastle | awk '{print $2}' | xargs -r docker volume rm
   364→
   365→# Remove network
   366→docker network rm sandcastle-web
   367→
   368→# Recreate network
   369→docker network create sandcastle-web
   370→
   371→# Start fresh
   372→mise run deploy:local:reset
   373→```
   374→
   375→## Default Admin Credentials
   376→
   377→The migrate service creates a default admin user (see `docker-compose.local.yml` lines 169-172):
   378→
   379→- **Username:** `thies`
   380→- **Email:** `thieso@gmail.com`
   381→- **Password:** `tubu`
   382→- **SSH Key:** (set in compose file)
   383→
   384→These are defined in the `SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_*` environment variables.
   385→
   386→## Development Workflow
   387→
   388→When using `mise run deploy:dev`:
   389→
   390→1. Source code is mounted at `/rails` in the container
   391→2. Changes to `.rb`, `.erb`, `.css` files reload automatically
   392→3. Tailwind CSS recompiles on save
   393→4. Gems are persisted in a volume (faster than bind mount)
   394→5. Database data persists between restarts
   395→
   396→**Tips:**
   397→- Edit files on the host, changes reflect immediately in the container
   398→- If you add a gem, rebuild: `docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build`
   399→- Database migrations: `docker exec -it sandcastle-web ./bin/rails db:migrate`
   400→- Run tests: `docker exec -it sandcastle-web ./bin/rails test`
   401→
   402→## CLI Development
   403→
   404→The Go CLI is in `vendor/sandcastle-cli/`. It's not part of the Docker Compose setup:
   405→
   406→```bash
   407→cd vendor/sandcastle-cli
   408→
   409→# Build
   410→make build
   411→
   412→# Test against local Sandcastle
   413→export SANDCASTLE_API_URL=https://localhost:8443
   414→export SANDCASTLE_API_TOKEN=sc_...  # Get from UI
   415→./sandcastle list
   416→```
   417→
   418→## Useful Docker Commands
   419→
   420→```bash
   421→# Restart a single service
   422→docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml restart web
   423→
   424→# Rebuild a single service
   425→docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up --build web
   426→
   427→# Execute a command in a container
   428→docker exec -it sandcastle-web bash
   429→
   430→# Copy files from container
   431→docker cp sandcastle-web:/rails/log/production.log ./
   432→
   433→# Copy files to container
   434→docker cp ./config.yml sandcastle-web:/rails/config/
   435→
   436→# Inspect container details
   437→docker inspect sandcastle-web
   438→
   439→# View resource usage
   440→docker stats
   441→
   442→# Prune unused images/volumes (be careful!)
   443→docker system prune -a
   444→```
   445→
   446→## File Locations
   447→
   448→### On Host
   449→
   450→- **Compose files:** `docker-compose.{local,dev}.yml`
   451→- **Mise config:** `mise.toml`
   452→- **Source code:** `.` (mounted in dev mode)
   453→
   454→### In Container
   455→
   456→- **Rails root:** `/rails`
   457→- **Data directory:** `/data`
   458→  - User homes: `/data/users/{username}/home`
   459→  - Sandbox volumes: `/data/sandboxes/{sandbox_name}/vol`
   460→  - Tailscale state: `/data/users/{username}/tailscale`
   461→  - WeTTY keys: `/data/wetty/{full_name}/`
   462→- **Traefik config:** `/data/traefik/dynamic/`
   463→- **Database:** `/var/lib/postgresql` (in postgres container)
   464→
   465→## Accessing Services
   466→
   467→| Service | URL | Notes |
   468→|---------|-----|-------|
   469→| Web UI (HTTPS) | https://sandcastle.local:8443 | Recommended, supports terminals |
   470→| Web UI (HTTP) | http://sandcastle.local:8080 | No TLS |
   471→| PostgreSQL | `localhost:5432` | Not exposed by default |
   472→| Traefik | — | No dashboard exposed |
   473→
   474→Add to `/etc/hosts` for `sandcastle.local`:
   475→```
   476→127.0.0.1 sandcastle.local
   477→```
   478→
   479→For localhost, use `https://localhost:8443`.
   480→

1→services:
     2→  traefik:
     3→    image: traefik:v3.3
     4→    restart: unless-stopped
     5→    ports:
     6→      - "8080:80"
     7→      - "8443:443"
     8→    volumes:
     9→      - traefik-data:/data
    10→    command:
    11→      - "--entrypoints.web.address=:80"
    12→      - "--entrypoints.websecure.address=:443"
    13→      - "--providers.file.directory=/data/dynamic"
    14→      - "--providers.file.watch=true"
    15→      - "--log.level=INFO"
    16→    networks:
    17→      - sandcastle-web
    18→    depends_on:
    19→      init-traefik:
    20→        condition: service_completed_successfully
    21→
    22→  init-traefik:
    23→    image: busybox
    24→    volumes:
    25→      - traefik-data:/data
    26→      - /tmp/sandcastle-traefik-certs:/certs:ro
    27→    command:
    28→      - sh
    29→      - -c
    30→      - |
    31→        mkdir -p /data/dynamic /data/certs
    32→        chown -R 220568:220568 /data
    33→
    34→        # Copy certificates
    35→        cp /certs/cert.pem /data/certs/
    36→        cp /certs/key.pem /data/certs/
    37→
    38→        cat > /data/dynamic/rails.yml << 'EOFCONFIG'
    39→        http:
    40→          routers:
    41→            rails-http:
    42→              rule: "Host(`sandcastle.local`)"
    43→              service: rails
    44→              entryPoints:
    45→                - web
    46→            rails-https:
    47→              rule: "Host(`sandcastle.local`)"
    48→              service: rails
    49→              entryPoints:
    50→                - websecure
    51→              tls: {}
    52→          services:
    53→            rails:
    54→              loadBalancer:
    55→                servers:
    56→                  - url: "http://sandcastle-web:80"
    57→                passHostHeader: true
    58→
    59→        tls:
    60→          certificates:
    61→            - certFile: /data/certs/cert.pem
    62→              keyFile: /data/certs/key.pem
    63→        EOFCONFIG
    64→
    65→  postgres:
    66→    image: postgres:18
    67→    restart: unless-stopped
    68→    volumes:
    69→      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql
    70→      - ./docker/postgres/init-databases.sh:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init-databases.sh:ro
    71→    environment:
    72→      POSTGRES_USER: sandcastle
    73→      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-sandcastle}
    74→      POSTGRES_DB: sandcastle_production
    75→    healthcheck:
    76→      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U sandcastle -d sandcastle_production"]
    77→      interval: 5s
    78→      timeout: 5s
    79→      retries: 5
    80→
    81→  init-data:
    82→    image: busybox
    83→    volumes:
    84→      - sandcastle-data:/data
    85→    command: sh -c "mkdir -p /data/users /data/sandboxes && chown -R 220568:220568 /data"
    86→
    87→  web:
    88→    image: sandcastle:local
    89→    build:
    90→      context: .
    91→      args:
    92→        BUILD_VERSION: "${BUILD_VERSION:-dev}"
    93→        BUILD_GIT_SHA: "${BUILD_GIT_SHA:-local}"
    94→        BUILD_GIT_DIRTY: "${BUILD_GIT_DIRTY:-false}"
    95→        BUILD_DATE: "${BUILD_DATE:-$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)}"
    96→    container_name: sandcastle-web
    97→    command: ["./bin/rails", "server", "-b", "0.0.0.0", "-p", "80"]
    98→    group_add:
    99→      - "${DOCKER_GID:-0}"
   100→    volumes:
   101→      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
   102→      - sandcastle-data:/data
   103→      - traefik-data:/data/traefik
   104→    networks:
   105→      - default
   106→      - sandcastle-web
   107→    environment:
   108→      RAILS_ENV: production
   109→      SECRET_KEY_BASE: ${SECRET_KEY_BASE:-deadbeef}
   110→      SANDCASTLE_HOST: sandcastle.local
   111→      SANDCASTLE_DATA_DIR: /data
   112→      SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE: selfsigned
   113→      SANDCASTLE_TERMINAL_URL: https://localhost:8443
   114→      DB_HOST: postgres
   115→      DB_USER: sandcastle
   116→      DB_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-sandcastle}
   117→    restart: unless-stopped
   118→    depends_on:
   119→      init-data:
   120→        condition: service_completed_successfully
   121→      migrate:
   122→        condition: service_completed_successfully
   123→
   124→  worker:
   125→    image: sandcastle:local
   126→    build:
   127→      context: .
   128→      args:
   129→        BUILD_VERSION: "${BUILD_VERSION:-dev}"
   130→        BUILD_GIT_SHA: "${BUILD_GIT_SHA:-local}"
   131→        BUILD_GIT_DIRTY: "${BUILD_GIT_DIRTY:-false}"
   132→        BUILD_DATE: "${BUILD_DATE:-$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)}"
   133→    container_name: sandcastle-worker
   134→    command: ["bundle", "exec", "rake", "solid_queue:start"]
   135→    group_add:
   136→      - "${DOCKER_GID:-0}"
   137→    volumes:
   138→      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
   139→      - sandcastle-data:/data
   140→      - traefik-data:/data/traefik
   141→    networks:
   142→      - default
   143→      - sandcastle-web
   144→    environment:
   145→      RAILS_ENV: production
   146→      SECRET_KEY_BASE: ${SECRET_KEY_BASE:-deadbeef}
   147→      SANDCASTLE_HOST: sandcastle.local
   148→      SANDCASTLE_DATA_DIR: /data
   149→      SANDCASTLE_TLS_MODE: selfsigned
   150→      DB_HOST: postgres
   151→      DB_USER: sandcastle
   152→      DB_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-sandcastle}
   153→    restart: unless-stopped
   154→    depends_on:
   155→      init-data:
   156→        condition: service_completed_successfully
   157→      migrate:
   158→        condition: service_completed_successfully
   159→
   160→  migrate:
   161→    image: sandcastle:local
   162→    command: ["./bin/rails", "db:prepare"]
   163→    environment:
   164→      RAILS_ENV: production
   165→      SECRET_KEY_BASE: ${SECRET_KEY_BASE:-deadbeef}
   166→      DB_HOST: postgres
   167→      DB_USER: sandcastle
   168→      DB_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD:-sandcastle}
   169→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_USER: thies
   170→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_EMAIL: thieso@gmail.com
   171→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_PASSWORD: tubu
   172→      SANDCASTLE_ADMIN_SSH_KEY: "ssh-ed25519 REDACTED thieso@gmail.com"
   173→      SANDCASTLE_SKIP_PASSWORD_CHANGE: "true"
   174→    depends_on:
   175→      postgres:
   176→        condition: service_healthy
   177→
   178→networks:
   179→  sandcastle-web:
   180→    external: true
   181→
   182→volumes:
   183→  pgdata:
   184→  sandcastle-data:
   185→  traefik-data:
   186→

     2→  if Rails.env.production?
     3→    host = ENV["SANDCASTLE_HOST"]

    12→  end
    13→end
